summary.description: One paragraph overall summary of the review, covering what a human reviewer should pay close attention to.

risk_level.description: Overall risk level of the changes in this diff.

findings.description: Specific issues found in the diff. Empty if nothing worth flagging.

file.description: Relative path to the file containing the issue.

line.description: 1-indexed line number in the file where the issue occurs.

severity.description: How severe this specific finding is.

description.description: What is wrong and why, specific enough for a reviewer to act on.
